questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Stroke
questions.question_text: What are the key observations you would monitor for a patient with stroke?
expected_points: Assess stroke using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to stroke
Implement evidence-based interventions for stroke
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in emergency setting
